title: Add SkiaSharp.Views.Gtk4 using GirCore.Gtk-4.0 bindings
body: **Description of Change** Adds GTK 4 views for SkiaSharp using GirCore.Gtk-4.0 (v0.7.0), mirroring the existing GTK 3 views but using GTK 4 idioms. **Key GTK 3 → GTK 4 differences:** - `SetDrawFunc` callback replaces `OnDrawn` override - `Gdk.RGBA` (float 0–1) replaces `Gdk.Color` (16-bit) - `Graphene.Point`/`Size`/`Rect` (float-based) replace `Gdk.Point`/`Size` (int-based) - `Cairo.Internal.ImageSurface.GetData(handle)` replaces `ImageSurface.DataPtr` - `ApplicationWindow` with code-only creation replaces `Window` + `.glade` builder - `Application.New()` / `RunWithSynchronizationContext()` replaces `Application.Init()` / `Run()` **Files added:** - **Library** — `source/SkiaSharp.Views/SkiaSharp.Views.Gtk4/` (`SKDrawingArea`, `GTKExtensions`, csproj) - **Sample** — `samples/Basic/Gtk4/SkiaSharpSample/` (Program, MainWindow, csproj, sln) - **Tests** — `tests/SkiaSharp.Views.Gtk4.Tests/` (29 tests: Graphene point/size/rect/point3D conversions, Gdk rectangle/color conversions, SKColorF conversions, round-trips, widget construction; includes `ModuleInit.cs` with `[ModuleInitializer]` to register GLib/Gdk/Cairo/Graphene DLL import resolvers; uses `[SkippableFact]` for GTK widget tests) - **Infra** — `build.cake` version entry, `scripts/VERSIONS.txt` nuget version entry, `SkiaSharpSource.sln` project entry, `SkiaSharpSource.Linux.slnf` / `SkiaSharpSource.Mac.slnf` / `SkiaSharpSource.Windows.slnf` filter entries All GirCore packages resolve from the existing `dotnet-public` Azure DevOps mirror — no changes to `nuget.config` are required. ```csharp // GTK4 usage — same event-driven pattern as GTK3 var skiaView = new SKDrawingArea(); skiaView.PaintSurface += (sender, e) => { var canvas = e.Surface.Canvas; canvas.Clear(SKColors.White); canvas.DrawText("SkiaSharp on GTK4", 100, 100, SKTextAlign.Center, font, paint); }; ``` **Additional fixes:** - Added `.nuget/` to `.gitignore` to prevent `.nuget/nuget.exe` (an 8MB build artifact) from being accidentally committed. The `nuget.exe` binary is unnecessary — `dotnet restore` handles all package restoration. - Added `SkiaSharp.Views.Gtk4` nuget version entry to `scripts/VERSIONS.txt` so the CI sample build's `ProjectReference` → `PackageReference` substitution resolves correctly. **Bugs Fixed** None — new feature. **API Changes** Added: - `SkiaSharp.Views.Gtk.SKDrawingArea` (extends `Gtk.DrawingArea`, uses `SetDrawFunc`) - `SKSize SKDrawingArea.CanvasSize { get; }` - `event EventHandler SKDrawingArea.PaintSurface` - `SKPoint GTKExtensions.ToSKPoint(this Graphene.Point)` - `Graphene.Point GTKExtensions.ToGraphenePoint(this SKPoint)` - `SKPoint3 GTKExtensions.ToSKPoint3(this Graphene.Point3D)` - `Graphene.Point3D GTKExtensions.ToGraphenePoint3D(this SKPoint3)` - `SKSize GTKExtensions.ToSKSize(this Graphene.Size)` - `Graphene.Size GTKExtensions.ToGrapheneSize(this SKSize)` - `SKRect GTKExtensions.ToSKRect(this Graphene.Rect)` - `Graphene.Rect GTKExtensions.ToGrapheneRect(this SKRect)` - `SKRectI GTKExtensions.ToSKRectI(this Gdk.Rectangle)` - `Gdk.Rectangle GTKExtensions.ToGdkRectangle(this SKRectI)` - `SKColor GTKExtensions.ToSKColor(this Gdk.RGBA)` - `Gdk.RGBA GTKExtensions.ToGdkRGBA(this SKColor)` - `SKColorF GTKExtensions.ToSKColorF(this Gdk.RGBA)` - `Gdk.RGBA GTKExtensions.ToGdkRGBA(this SKColorF)` **Behavioral Changes** None. **Required skia PR** None. **PR Checklist** - [x] Has tests (29 tests covering Graphene point/size/rect/point3D, Gdk rectangle, SKColor/SKColorF color conversions, round-trips, and widget construction) - [x] Rebased on top of main at time of PR - [x] Merged related skia PRs - [x] Changes adhere to coding standard - [x] Updated documentation --- ✨ Let Copilot coding agent [set things up for you](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/issues/new?title=✨+Set+up+Copilot+instructions&body=Configure%20instructions%20for%20this%20repository%20as%20documented%20in%20%5BBest%20practices%20for%20Copilot%20coding%20agent%20in%20your%20repository%5D%28https://gh.io/copilot-coding-agent-tips%29%2E%0A%0A%3COnboard%20this%20repo%3E&assignees=copilot) — coding agent works faster and does higher quality work when set up for your repo.
